title: 皐月賞の後に・ジャンプ&キャッチ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After an intense battle for first place in the
Satsuki Sho, Tamamo Cross emerges victorious...
but barely able to stand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She then finds an unlikely friend in Gold City,
whose flashy looks also make her a target.
Recognizing each other's skills, the two vow to
keep fighting in future races.
